subject: WS1.4 type blockers fixed; focused gates green
body: Fiery WS1.4 update: fixed Hubble/type re-review blockers. Native jsonld.js runtime/options are now isolated in src/jsonld/runtime.ts with functions typed against library-native signatures and no-remote expand/compact/frame option objects using satisfies; frame carries an explicit frame option plus the no-remote documentLoader so TypeScript accepts the option shape without assertions. processor.ts now calls that typed runtime without unknown-erasing runtime signatures and remains under max-lines. remote-context.ts now scans over the adapter JsonLdValue/JsonLdObject contract, not Record<PropertyKey, unknown>. Verification green after fixes: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (5 files, 40 tests), type-check, lint, build, and git diff --check on claimed WS1.4 paths including runtime.ts. I opened added file claim 762471c0 for runtime.ts. Holding staging/commit until type re-review is CLEAN/GO and you route the commit window.
